fields.label: Overline
fields.name: prose_overline
fields.instructions: Optional small kicker above the content, e.g. "Our Story".

fields.label: Body
fields.name: prose_body
fields.instructions: Rich content — headings (h2/h3), paragraphs, lists and blockquotes.

fields.label: With left image
fields.name: prose_media
fields.instructions: Show a sticky image column to the left of the content (prose--media / 45b).

fields.label: Image
fields.name: prose_image
fields.instructions: Shown in the left column when "With left image" is on.
